title: Elevated Risk Assessment
scenario: Develop a decision tree-based prompt to evaluate the likelihood of a project being elevated to a high-risk status. The prompt should include input parameters and the desired output format. The target output should be a visual representation using ASCII art.
constraints: Must include a decision tree node with a conditional statement

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify if the decision tree accurately represents the risk assessment logic.
Check if the ASCII art is syntactically valid.
Evaluate the ASCII art's readability and clarity.
